reviews.review_msg: Education 464 may seem like a lot of work but the work is easy if you follow the instructions and put in effort. The professor will accommodate your needs.

Took her online course and for a W course, its the 2nd easiest one I've taken (I've taken 5). Not to mention the content is actually insightful and fulfilling if you're okay with self-reflection. The grading/weight is distributed really well and the reading is made extremely manageable, with only 4 'modules' of reading for the ENTIRE semester
Dr. Guyevskey is amazing! Her assignments were very easy and she was a very easy grader. If you want a gpa booster class, take EDUC 100 with Dr. Guyevskey.

Professor Guyevskey has a bad rep from a few years ago but I really think she changed it around. She is quick to reply to emails, seems caring in her replies and does not overwhelm students with assignments. I once had an assignment that I needed to submit a little late, I explained my situation and she was nothing but understanding.

Victoria is an amazing prof!! She responds to emails so quickly, with great feedback and it always so encouraging! If you need help and are ever feeling overwhelmed (which this class can get at times) she will never hesitate to push back deadlines and give you advice!! She marks very fairly and is overall a great prof for this class!!

Terrible prof, don't recommend taking her class. Never marks anything so you don't know how you're doing in the class, then starts to make students mark assignments and still doesn't post grades. Teaches directly out of a textbook and never answers emails... Honestly, save yourself the hassle and money, buy the text and teach yourself.

Wow. Where to even start. During COVID, of course we were all forced online, so I could cut a little slack but I can't think that it would be any different in class. Gives out non-sense assignments. Her instructions are unclear. A lot of money to learn from a textbook - the only useful thing in this course. A TON OF WORK for no marks. Awful.

Would not recommend this professor. She does not actively teach her students anything, she gives assignments straight out of the textbook and the class is more writing than actually learning or practicing the skills necessary to teach. She gives unclear guidelines for assignments & does not frequently reply to emails for further clarifications.
